game_info.title: Cut the Rope
game_info.description: Cut the Rope is a physics-based puzzle game where you must deliver candy to Om Nom, a cute green monster. Cut ropes strategically to swing the candy through the level, collect up to 3 gold stars for bonus points, and avoid hazards like spikes. Use air cushions and bubbles to manipulate the candy's trajectory. Each level presents a unique puzzle requiring careful timing and planning.
game_info.controls:
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options (when in menu screens)
Space: Apply Magic Finger impulse to candy (once per level, during gameplay)
Z: Restart current level immediately
Mouse Drag: Swipe across a rope to cut it
Mouse Click: Activate interactive elements (air cushions, bubbles)
